name: process-vault
description: Process the AI Employee vault by reading Needs_Action folder, creating plans, and moving completed tasks to Done. This is the core skill for the Bronze Tier AI Employee.

action.description: The action to perform on the vault

task_id.description: Specific task ID to process (optional, for 'process' action)

dry_run.description: If true, only show what would be done without making changes
